description: Input event sequence for Kotoba TTS v1.0 (promptless, one-shot) bidirectional streaming

events._comment: Step 1: Configure session (must be the first client message, sent within WS_OPEN_TIMEOUT = 10s). `speaker_id` selects one of the available voice presets (see session_config.speaker_id_examples below). `default` is always available.

Step 2: Submit a synthesis turn. v1.0 is one-shot: the full `text` is sent inside `response.create`. There is no input_text_buffer.append / input_text_buffer.commit. `response_id` is optional (server generates a UUID when omitted) and is echoed on every response-scoped server event.
events.text: こんにちは、世界。今日もよろしくお願いします。

session_config._speaker_id_note: `default` is always available; additional preset keys depend on the bundle. Unknown ids fail with response.done {status: failed, error.code: unknown_speaker_id}.

response_create_fields.text: Required, non-empty string. The full text to synthesize.
response_create_fields.response_id: Optional string. Echoed back on response.created / audio.chunk / response.done. Defaults to a server-generated UUID.

cancel._comment: Send to cancel the currently active response. The server replies with response.done (status=cancelled) within WS_CANCEL_GRACE_TIMEOUT.

output_audio_format_specs.transport: Base64-encoded little-endian bytes carried in audio.chunk.audio
